headline: Essex Property Trust (ESS) Stock Could Be A Bargain Despite Rich Earnings
summary: Essex Property Trust has delivered a 39.2% return over the past three years, yet there is a clear split between what its intrinsic value estimate suggests and what traditional market multiples signal about the stock at around US$298 per share. A 39.2% gain over three years points to steady shareholder returns that invite a closer look at whether the current price still offers a margin of safety. The Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate indicates Essex Property Trust may trade...
